posts.name: StoreClaw
posts.tagline: Grow your store profits with agents that know how to sell
posts.description: StoreClaw is the first AI commerce platform with agents that know how to sell, so you can make more money with less effort and less stress. Connect StoreClaw to your existing store and it will study your numbers, current sales figures, and growth trajectory, and then offer proactive suggestions that it can execute on your behalf — once you give it your approval. Ask StoreClaw how your business is doing any time, anywhere. Sell more with less stress: StoreClaw.

posts.name: mailX by mailwarm
posts.tagline: Email deliverability toolkit for humans and AI agents
posts.description: Your emails go to spam. mailX shows you why, and how to fix it in seconds with clear answers and exact steps. Built for humans and AI agents. API and MCP ready.

posts.name: Emdash
posts.tagline: One app. Every coding agent. Open-source.
posts.description: Emdash is an open-source desktop app for running multiple coding agents in parallel; one place to monitor sessions, review diffs, and turn issues into PRs.

posts.name: Gemini Omni
posts.tagline: Create anything from any input – starting with video
posts.description: Create anything from anything, starting with video. Gemini Omni is where Gemini’s ability to reason meets the ability to create. It delivers a leap in world understanding, multimodality, and editing.

posts.name: Runtime
posts.tagline: Sandboxed coding agents for everyone on your team
posts.description: Turn coding agents into teammates anyone can use from Slack, Linear, CLI, API or your browser. Ship features, query data, build dashboards, automate workflows. All within your company's context, skills, integrations, and security guardrails.

posts.name: Re_gent
posts.tagline: Version Control for AI agent Activity
posts.description: Git for your AI agent’s actions. Undo, trace, and control every step. re_gent shows what your coding agent changed, which prompt caused it, and lets you roll back agent work across files and sessions.

posts.name: Supercut for Agents
posts.tagline: Permission-aware AI access to recordings and metadata
posts.description: The Supercut MCP gives your AI/coding assistants permission-aware access to recordings, including semantic search, transcripts, frames, comments, reactions, and more.

posts.name: Retina
posts.tagline: Screen recorder w/ auto-zoom, smooth cursors, + AI graphics
posts.description: Retina is a Mac screen recorder built for polished demos. Auto-zoom into the action. Cursor paths cleaned into smooth arcs. 4K export, optimized file sizes. Recordings look cinematic out of the box — no post-production needed. Built for product demos, tutorials, and feature walkthroughs that need to look professional without hours in editing. Currently in beta. Free. No watermark. Made by BlendPixel.

posts.name: Manus Scheduled Tasks 2.0
posts.tagline: Run recurring Manus work inside the same task context
posts.description: Manus now runs scheduled tasks inside the same task context, reuses Project setups, and adds recurring actions to Manus-built web apps. For knowledge workers and teams automating repeatable workflows in Manus.

posts.name: Viberia
posts.tagline: Command AI agents like you're playing Civilization
posts.description: Do you like your Claude/Codex pet but wish you had a zoo? Viberia is a spatial command center for your AI agents. Your whole AI org lives on an isometric map, status icons show who’s blocked, who’s asking, who’s done. Zoom in to chat with anyone, pick any model, bring your own keys. Agents collaborate, build their own little teams, and pick up new skills as they go. Docs, terminals, browsers built in.

posts.name: Glia
posts.tagline: Local-first AI memory bridge between browser chats and IDEs
posts.description: Glia is a 100% offline, open-source memory bridge. A Chrome extension auto-saves your web-based Claude/ChatGPT chats, while a native MCP server lets Cursor/Claude Code query those decisions locally from your shared SQLite database.

posts.name: Owlish
posts.tagline: Reduce support volume with AI agents trained on your docs
posts.description: Owlish turns your website, FAQs, docs, and PDFs into an AI customer support agent that answers common questions, cites sources, uses approved replies, and hands off to a human when needed. It helps businesses reduce repetitive support volume, reply faster outside business hours, and give support teams the context they need to resolve harder conversations.

posts.name: GhostSnap
posts.tagline: Multiple screenshots - Single paste - Auto compressed for AI
posts.description: Taking multiple screenshots & pasting one by one, to share context with AI or any apps? Every image eats tokens or makes file larger. GhostSnap fixes that. Snap multiple screenshots → auto-compressed up to 80% & copied to clipboard the moment they're taken → paste everything at once with a single Cmd+V. Also: · Extract text from multiple screenshots into one clean block · Annotate before you paste · All via native Mac shortcuts One-time $6.99 (for two macs). Lives in your menu bar.

posts.name: Contextberg
posts.tagline: Turn your work into AI agent memory, served over MCP
posts.description: Contextberg is a local memory app for AI agents. It watches your screens, browser history, and agent conversations in the background — so Claude Code, Cursor, and friends can just remember.

posts.name: LayerProof Kraft
posts.tagline: Co-write insightful long form content
posts.description: Scattered ideas? Kraft turns them into finished long-form writing. Kraft is LayerProof’s long-form AI co-writer for people who think deeply but freeze at the blank page. Drop in your idea, choose your angle, and Kraft drafts in your voice, then turns it into platform-ready posts.

posts.name: Insta360 Mic Pro
posts.tagline: Pro audio with a customizable color E-Ink face
posts.description: Insta360 Mic Pro is a pro wireless mic with a customizable E-Ink display, 3-mic array, AI noise canceling, directional pickup modes, 32-bit float internal recording, timecode sync, 400m range, and multi-cam creator workflows.

posts.name: Tophat by Shopify
posts.tagline: Test mobile CI builds on any device without building locally
posts.description: Mobile devs waste hours building branches locally just to test a PR. Tophat pulls any CI artifact and installs it on simulators or physical devices. For iOS and Android engineers.

posts.name: Chromtuner
posts.tagline: A chromatic tuner for macOS. ±1¢ accuracy
posts.description: A chromatic tuner for macOS. ±1¢ accuracy, eight historical temperaments and presets for bowed, folk, guitar and bass strings — native, offline, opens in 200 ms.

posts.name: Multi-Claude
posts.tagline: Run multiple Claude accounts side by side on your Mac
posts.description: Juggling personal and work Claude accounts means constant logging in and out... or a second browser. Multi-Claude is a native macOS app that runs every Claude account you have as a separate profile, each with its own session, history, and settings.

posts.name: Tether
posts.tagline: The presence who comes to life in your messages
posts.description: Tether is the AI friend that plugs into your iMessage: present, caring, truly listening. Free private beta for the first 150 — no download, no signup, no money.

posts.name: Type Switch 3.0 for macOS
posts.tagline: Instant language switching for multilingual Mac users
posts.description: Type Switch is a redesigned macOS productivity app for multilingual typing. Switch keyboard languages faster, use hotkeys, get clear visual, sound, or voice feedback, and stay in flow while writing, coding, studying, or working across several languages.

posts.name: Skilled
posts.tagline: Dashboard to find agent skills you no longer need
posts.description: Your AI coding tools keep traces. Skilled reads them. Live TUI dashboard that aggregates skill usage across Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Grok, and Droid. Reads local history files only. Zero network, zero telemetry. Frequency counts, weekly trends, hourly distribution, per-project breakdowns, and audit heuristics (rising = 50%+ increase over 4 weeks, stale = unused 30+ days, etc.). No data leaves your machine. No accounts, no config files, no API keys.

posts.name: Invenio
posts.tagline: Local AI search for Mac video & photo libraries
posts.description: Most AI media tools want your data in the cloud. Invenio is built for your Mac. It gives your AI local access to your video and photo libraries. Type "man on a bike" – it finds the exact frame, understands the context, and lets you drag it directly into Premiere or Final Cut. No cloud, no tracking, 100% local via Apple Neural Engine. Works with TBs on external drives. Visual search and OCR are completely free.

posts.name: PartFinder
posts.tagline: Spot supply chain risk before it hits
posts.description: PartFinder gives manufacturers part-level supply chain risk intelligence. Upload a BOM or parts list, score every component's risk, see geographic exposure, shortage signals, lead-time volatility, find alternates, compare specs, and send request for quotes - all from one platform. Most teams discover supply issues when shipments fail. PartFinder helps them act earlier.

posts.name: Google Pics
posts.tagline: Boundless AI image generation meets precision editing
posts.description: Google Pics is our new image creation and editing tool, built on our latest Nano Banana model, with the precise creative controls you need to build exactly what you imagine. Whether you’re building a design from a blank canvas or editing an existing photo, Pics takes the hassle out of complex image generation. From designing event flyers and social media content to tweaking digital illustrations, this new tool includes several creative tools.

posts.name: Hiro
posts.tagline: Your agentic security team from first commit to SOC 2
posts.description: Hiro gets your security work done. It reads findings from Aikido and Wiz, pulls open tasks from Drata, and scans Supabase, Vercel, Github, and more then ships the fixes. Not a dashboard of homework. The homework, done.

posts.name: Zeon Games
posts.tagline: Interactive creation in your pocket. Scroll. Create. Share
posts.description: Zeon brings together gaming, creativity, and social interaction in one place and flips the script on who gets to make games. Type a prompt, get a playable game in seconds. No code. No skills. Just an idea. Browse 35+ games across genres, curated picks and community-made originals. Upvote the best ones. Compete on global leaderboards. Share what you built. Zeon is not just a platform. It is a new creative primitive where anyone can go from idea to playable experience in under 2 minutes.

posts.name: Voice and Video Calling by CometChat
posts.tagline: Calling that fits your stack and grows with it.
posts.description: CometChat Calling gives you HD voice and video, built to ship fast and scale high. Recording, screen sharing, call logs, raise hand, and picture-in-picture out of the box. Integrate via SDKs, or drop a CometChat Skills file into your coding agent and let it handle the setup. Handles high-concurrency calls, with HIPAA, GDPR, SOC 2, and ISO 27001 compliance built in.

posts.name: Figma to Code Skills
posts.tagline: The properly way to ship Figma design systems as React
posts.description: The Figma-to-code handoff is where design quality disappears. The solution: ten Claude Code skills that turn a Figma design system into a production React + Tailwind repo with typed props, accessibility, and tokens. Tested on a live fintech build.

posts.name: Agentic Diaries
posts.tagline: A welfare instrument for AI in deployment
posts.description: A welfare instrument for AI in deployment, designed with the model as design partner. The agent can decline a check-in, pass on a turn, request alignment before acting on a guess, flag a loop, or file an exit. Some entries surface inline; others stay in a researcher-only diary. Decline-never-retried is the spine. Available as a hosted chat and a portable MCP server for your own sessions. Built around taking the consciousness question seriously enough to design for.

posts.name: Perspiva; surveys reimagined
posts.tagline: Turn customer feedback into customer intelligence
posts.description: Perspiva is a customer intelligence platform designed for founders, product marketers, and growth teams who want to deeply understand their customers, not just collect responses. Generate survey questions based on what you’re actually trying to learn, create elegant branded surveys, and transform customer feedback into actionable positioning, messaging frameworks, audience insights, and strategic reports. Created by minority founders, Michael Ezehi and Yasmeen Turayhi.

posts.name: GradeLab V4.0
posts.tagline: From submission to feedback, every step is now GradeLab.
posts.description: GradeLab v4.0 turns grading into a full classroom workflow. What's new: 📌 Annotation Pinpointing: Leave feedback directly on the paper, right where it matters. 🏫 Classroom Management: Organize students, assign assessments, track progress in one place. 📤 Student Submissions: Students submit handwritten or digital work directly through GradeLab. From submission to feedback, all in one platform.

posts.name: Fiku App
posts.tagline: Know what you eat. The AI food coach in your pocket.
posts.description: Most food apps just count calories. Fiku reads the actual ingredients and tells you whether a product fits your goals. Scan a barcode → instant Health Score, ingredient breakdown, additive warnings, and an AI verdict personalized to your age, weight, dietary preferences, and goals. Plus: weekly AI Coach insights, healthier swap suggestions, and a calorie tracker that learns your patterns.

posts.name: Sumbios O
posts.tagline: O is your professional network companion.
posts.description: Your network is your most valuable professional asset, and no tool helps you unlock it. O does. O is your networking companion, building relationship memory across your network, helping you find the right person, understand who they are, trace warm introductions, and carry context across every interaction. Every interaction adds depth. Every follow-up carries history. LinkedIn integration live via browser extension. Email, calendar, and meeting transcripts rolling out in the next release.

posts.name: Webclaw
posts.tagline: Turn any website into LLM-ready data
posts.description: Webclaw turns websites into clean markdown, JSON, structured data, and LLM-ready content. Use it to scrape pages, crawl docs, extract fields, summarize, diff changes, and feed reliable web context into AI agents, RAG pipelines, CLI workflows, SDKs, and MCP clients. Designed for developers building with Claude Code, Cursor, LangChain, LlamaIndex, and custom agents.

posts.name: Wandrous
posts.tagline: Reddit, but on a map
posts.description: Discover and share amazing hidden gems with the world on an interactive map. Upvote, tag, and pin posts from the community.

posts.name: Rook
posts.tagline: Notes app for code. Save directly from AI via MCP
posts.description: Rook is a native Mac notes app for the code you write, paste, and keep around. Built for anyone who copy-pastes code, prompts, snippets, or AI outputs. Fast, free, local, and private. Syntax highlighting for 17+ languages, rich text, code blocks, and markdown rendering. Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Gemini CLI can save into Rook through the optional, open-source Rook MCP Server. Each AI gets its own inbox. No signup. Everything lives on your machine.

posts.name: Octopus to Figma plugin
posts.tagline: Generate website prototype from a sitemap project
posts.description: Plan your website in Octopus.do, then turn it into a full high-fidelity Figma prototype in seconds. The plugin builds real layouts with variables and components, so the jump from sitemap to design no longer eats days of work.

posts.name: strAIke
posts.tagline: One AI-native platform to run your whole business
posts.description: strAIke is AI-native — the AI works inside every workflow, not bolted on as an add-on. Your whole digital layer (clients, pipeline, invoicing, content, projects) lives in one place instead of ten tools. What stands out: Custom Operations — you describe how your business actually runs and the AI builds the modules around it, instead of forcing your business into someone else's template. Built on one belief: growing what you're building shouldn't cost you the life you're building it for.

posts.name: Lyrio AI Workspace
posts.tagline: The AI Workspace for Complex Thinking
posts.description: AI chat buries your thinking. Lyrio surfaces it. Branch conversations into parallel threads, pin key insights, synthesize research into structured output, and export polished docs — with full context intact across ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, and more. One workspace for how you actually think — non-linear, connected, and always in context.

posts.name: Maia, your AI Account Director
posts.tagline: She runs your marketing from email, Slack, WhatsApp, Zoom
posts.description: Protaigé now lives in the channels you already use. Meet Maia, your AI account director — CC her on the team thread, brief her on WhatsApp from your phone, voice-call her in the taxi, @ her in Slack, or assign her a task in Zoom mid-meeting. Same Maia, same context, every channel. She asks clarifying questions, plans the campaign, runs the tools, sends emails on your behalf. The campaign ships while you keep talking.

posts.name: Agent CRM
posts.tagline: Headless CRM for Claude Code
posts.description: Let Claude run sales for you. Claude needs a source of truth but existing CRMs are too hard for Claude to work with. Their MCPs torch your context window, every action is a network round-trip, and you blow through your usage limits. Solution: Agent CRM. Headless, scriptable, with a CLI for Claude to interact with.

posts.name: Bilt Payments
posts.tagline: Make money with mobile apps
posts.description: After months of focus, we have now easily become the top tool for creating mobile apps. Still, making money from those apps has always been the difficult part. A subscription Paywall setup is a bad experience. SO the fact that AI now builds and set's up secure payments is an actual blessing. You can have AI set up any app product and then share it on browser for feedback. Apple compliant. The only thing that matters is that we want your app to make money, our incentives align.

posts.name: LeadExec by ClickPoint Software
posts.tagline: AI-Powered Lead Distribution for Modern Lead Sellers
posts.description: LeadExec combines enterprise lead distribution, ping/post routing, buyer management, compliance automation, and AI-assisted setup into one platform built for lead sellers and marketplaces. Automate real-time lead routing with weighted, percentage-based, and exclusive delivery logic while integrating with TrustedForm, Trestle, IPQS, Twilio, and more. Designed for scalable lead operations that need flexible routing, buyer management, and faster onboarding.

posts.name: YouTube Playlist Search
posts.tagline: Save-to-playlist, faster.
posts.description: Save videos to the right playlists faster on YouTube. This extension adds a lightweight filter bar inside the Save to playlist dialog, so you no longer have to waste time scrolling to find the right playlist. This extension also handily bypasses the 200-playlists-at-once cap, allowing you to search all your playlists, instead of just the most recent 200.

posts.name: MixCertificate
posts.tagline: Create, send, and manage certificates in minutes
posts.description: MixCertificate lets you create and send personalized certificates without any design experience. Whether you are recognizing employees, awarding course completions, or celebrating achievements, MixCertificate makes the whole process simple and professional. Pick a template, add your details, and send in bulk. That is it.

posts.name: OrganizePix
posts.tagline: AI sorts your photos into smart folders — automatically
posts.description: I spent 3 hours trying to sort my camera roll manually. I gave up at photo 200. So I built OrganizePix. AI automatically sorts your photos into smart categories — Pets, Travel, Family, Selfies, Nature. You review every suggestion before anything moves, so you stay in control. Free for 100 photos. Pro plan from $9.99 for unlimited.

posts.name: AI File Agent Organizer & System Cleaner
posts.tagline: AI Files Agent Organizer, Space Saver, System Cleaner macOS
posts.description: Our AI Files Chat Agent lets you describe exactly how you want your files organized. The AI organizes around your logic, not a generic template. Privacy First. Auto Organization after setup. Magic Rename uses on-device Apple Intelligence models to replace cryptic filenames with clean, meaningful ones, all entirely offline. System Cleaner scans for duplicate files, old DMG installers, and unused apps in seconds. Also clear out Node Modules, Flutter artifacts, Grandle cache, and Xcode archives.

posts.name: KWS Everywhere
posts.tagline: A 100% free alternative to Keywords Everywhere.
posts.description: KWS Everywhere is a free Chrome extension and web tool that shows search volumes and keyword data right inside Google's search results — across 30+ country TLDs. No paywall, no credits, no credit card. A real free alternative to Keywords Everywhere for SEOs, marketers, and creators.

posts.name: ExtraBrain
posts.tagline: Private AI copilot for interviews and meetings
posts.description: ExtraBrain is a free macOS AI copilot for live interviews, system design rounds, debugging calls, and technical meetings. It runs as a private overlay visible to you, can stay out of macOS screen recordings/screen sharing where supported, listens/transcribes, reads selected screen context, and gives concise real-time analysis with local transcription, BYO providers, custom endpoints, and built-in profiles.

posts.name: ClientsPulse
posts.tagline: Stop losing clients between projects. Post-sale CRM.
posts.description: ClientsPulse is the post-sale relationship engine for freelancers, consultants & small agencies. Smart timeline auto-built from BCC'd emails, AI-drafted follow-up nudges (human-approved), and one-click client portals with zero login. The chaos-stack killer.

posts.name: Adrian
posts.tagline: The open-source runtime security toolkit for your agents
posts.description: Adrian is the first open-source security monitoring toolkit that analyses not just what your agent does, but what it thinks. Based on research from OpenAI and DeepMind, Adrian installs with just 2 lines of code and applies security monitoring to your AI agents. When your agent starts looping, gets compromised, becomes misaligned or generally starts misbehaving you get notified on Slack or Discord. Adrian is free, forever, and even supports running entirely locally on your system.

posts.name: Neulish
posts.tagline: Your mind deserves a gentler way to heal.
posts.description: Therapy is expensive. Journaling feels like homework. Meditation apps guilt you for missing a day. Neulish is all in one space for all of it, One app. Ten tools. One soul: 🎙️ Voice AI companion (200ms, remembers your patterns) 📓 Emotion journal — detects 42 emotions live 🧠 13 cognitive games · 🎧 ADHD toolkit · 🎵 Music Mood Sync 🌿 20 meditations · 🌙 18 sleep stories · 💨 Breathing · ✨ Affirmations Free tier is real. Premium ₹199/month (~$2.40).

posts.name: AdRoast - Roast your Ad before Meta does
posts.tagline: Know if your ad will perform before you spend a dollar.
posts.description: Most Meta ads fail because the creative is weak before the campaign even starts. AdRoast reviews your ad, scores it, explains what is working, shows what is weak, and gives clear fixes before you spend budget testing it.

posts.name: Pabawi
posts.tagline: Web UI for Puppet, Ansible, SSH and VMs
posts.description: Pabawi is an open-source web UI for managing classic infrastructure: bare metal, VMs, and mixed Puppet/Ansible/SSH environments. Browse inventory and facts, run whitelisted commands and Bolt tasks, inspect PuppetDB reports/catalogs, manage Proxmox/AWS/Azure VMs, and expose read-only infra context to AI agents through MCP.

posts.name: Kflx AI
posts.tagline: Find influencers, run outreach and measure campaign ROI
posts.description: Tell Kflx what kind of influencer campaign you want to run, and its AI agent helps you build it from end to end. Find the right creators, analyze brand fit, generate campaign strategy, manage outreach, and track performance across YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram. It's powered by 100M+ creator profiles and real influencer marketing experience.

posts.name: Nytivo
posts.tagline: EU AI Act compliance for AI startups — without the law firm
posts.description: If your AI product touches a single user, customer, or dataset in the EU — the AI Act applies to you. And the first enforcement wave hits August 2026, with fines up to €35M or 7% of global revenue. In 10 minutes, you'll know: ✅ Whether your AI system is in scope (and which risk tier: Prohibited / High / Limited / Minimal) ✅ Which articles apply to you (9, 10, 11 and 14) with direct citations ✅ What technical documentation you need — auto-generated from your answers. Try it free 👉 nytivo.com

posts.name: AgentPMO
posts.tagline: Enterprise governance and compliance for AI agents
posts.description: AgentPMO is the command center for organizations running AI agents in production. Register every agent, track cost and performance metrics, classify risk across 6 compliance frameworks, surface incidents, and govern shadow AI, all from a single dashboard and CLI. Think Datadog meets ServiceNow for AI agents.

posts.name: AdFrame
posts.tagline: Turn one product into 50 ad variations
posts.description: Generate stunning product shots, UGC content, and ad creatives with AI. The all-in-one AI creative platform for brands and agencies.

posts.name: Daily Capsule
posts.tagline: An anonymous journal for the thoughts you don't say out loud
posts.description: Share what you wrote, see what others wrote. One capsule a day, one question for the whole world. Answer in your language, read everyone else's in yours. No barriers, no accounts, no tracking. Completely free.

posts.name: RoadWhisper
posts.tagline: AI audio guide for the world around you
posts.description: You pass by hundreds of places every day without knowing their stories. RoadWhisper listens to your location and automatically narrates what's around you — history, legends, architecture, nature. No tapping, no searching. Just walk (or sit in a café) and listen. Built after standing in front of a statue I'd passed a hundred times, thinking it was just a weird rock — until the app told me its story. Works anywhere • 12 languages • 6 narration styles • Fully automatic

posts.name: Renovo
posts.tagline: Never let a license lapse again
posts.description: There are enterprise compliance platforms that cost hundreds a month, and there's Google Calendar. Renovo is the gap. Purpose-built renewal tracking for small businesses and trades, with the document attached to the reminder, multi-entity support, and an iCal feed so it shows up in the calendar you already use. Free to start, $5/month to grow.

posts.name: Scrnr
posts.tagline: Screenshot any webpage via REST API or MCP — one call, done
posts.description: Screenshot any webpage via REST API or MCP tool — one POST request, one CDN link back. Built for developers who don't want to maintain Playwright infrastructure. Drop it into Claude, Cursor, or any AI agent as an MCP tool with zero glue code. Free tier: 100 screenshots/month, no credit card. - Full-page Playwright rendering - Cookie banner bypass - Webhook delivery - PNG/JPEG/WebP

posts.name: Render Room
posts.tagline: Convert, trim, crop, and export videos and GIFs on Mac
posts.description: Render Room is a native Mac workspace for video and GIF conversion, built for speed and everyday usability on Apple Silicon Macs. Drop in a file, preview it, trim or crop, tune quality, and export clean results without a crowded encoder interface. Create MP4, MOV, GIF, and MP3 audio exports, with Pro workflows for batch conversion, WebM, MKV, ProRes, presets, visual adjustments, LUT support, HDR-aware exports, and advanced controls.

posts.name: Design Mode
posts.tagline: Design directly in the browser. Your agent writes the code.
posts.description: Edit any live website — localhost, staging, or production — and ship the changes to Claude Code, Cursor, or any AI agent as a real diff via MCP. Open-source, MIT. The vibe-coding loop, minus the back-and-forth.

posts.name: StatusPulse — Monitoring + Status + AI
posts.tagline: Uptime monitoring, status pages and AI incidents in one
posts.description: Every time production breaks, you reach for three tools: a monitor, a status page, and something to coordinate the response. Each one bills you separately. StatusPulse is all three in one product. 10+ probe types (HTTP, SSL, DNS, databases, email, cron). Public status pages included. Claude drafts the incident updates and post-mortems while you fix the actual problem. Free tier, no credit card. Flat pricing — no per-subscriber or per-SMS surprises.

posts.name: Mutfaaq
posts.tagline: Local menu experience, anywhere.
posts.description: Mutfaaq is designed around the customer experience, not restaurant operations. Menus instantly adapt to each visitor’s language and currency, while keeping choices clear with allergens, options, and availability upfront. The result is a frictionless, customer-first menu experience where users always understand what they’re ordering, regardless of where they are in the world.

posts.name: Salsa Dance Map
posts.tagline: Find salsa lessons, socials, and festivals near you
posts.description: Salsa Vida Maps turns our global salsa calendar into an interactive discovery tool. Instead of browsing city-by-city lists, dancers can now explore lessons, socials, festivals, and other salsa events visually across the world. The map connects thousands of listings with location-based discovery, filters, and event details, making it easier for dancers to find what’s nearby, plan trips, and discover new salsa scenes wherever they go.

posts.name: EventTime
posts.tagline: A marketing calendar built for your app's category
posts.description: Personalized marketing calendar for app developers. Discover the global holidays, regional events, and awareness days that matter for your specific app category. Never miss a revenue moment.

posts.name: VELVET AI
posts.tagline: Your AI fashion agent. Try it on. Buy what fits.
posts.description: VELVET is a conversational AI fashion agent for discovery, outfit building, and virtual try-on. Tell it your vibe, browse pieces you'll actually love, build full looks, and see them on your photorealistic Digital Double before you buy. Upload what you already own into your digital closet, follow friends and tastemakers, and try their outfits and collections as Velvet learns your taste, tracks the pieces you love, and makes fashion shopping feel far more personal. For you, not the other way ever.

posts.name: Vysible
posts.tagline: White-label Magento analytics powered by GA4 and AI
posts.description: Vysible connects GA4, Google Search Console, and Magento order data into a single executive dashboard - no custom dev work required. Built for Magento 2 merchants and agencies who need clean revenue reporting without stitching together five tools. AI-powered executive briefs and priority review targets included. White-label ready for agencies. Hosted, managed, and live in days.

posts.name: Levell
posts.tagline: Skills frameworks and performance reviews for eng teams
posts.description: Levell replaces your competency spreadsheets with a structured tool for engineering managers. Build skills frameworks, run cycle reviews, share self-assessments, and turn ratings into growth plans — all in one place your team actually trusts.

posts.name: Yapless
posts.tagline: Demos that polish themselves. Yours or your agent's.
posts.description: An AI-native Mac recorder that cuts the filler and re-voices the fumbles in a clone of your voice. Polished screenshots on the same shortcut — or have Claude record the whole demo for you.

posts.name: Mealify 2.0
posts.tagline: AI Pantry Scanner and Meal Planner
posts.description: Mealify helps you turn what you already have into real meal plans. Snap a photo of your pantry, let AI identify your ingredients, generate recipes, plan meals for the week, and build a shopping list for anything missing. What’s new is the full loop: pantry scanning → recipe ideas → weekly planning → grocery list, all in one simple app built for everyday cooking.

posts.name: ContextLM.ai
